title: MyKinLegacy One-Order LRE Prompt Replacement

productionScope.allowlistBehavior: Exactly one order number may be listed. Empty, missing, or multiple order numbers keep the old production prompt.

productionPromptLocation: packages/ai/src/prompt-rendering/renderer.ts -> renderPrompt() creates the old rendered prompt
packages/ai/src/generation/job-handlers.ts -> handleAiImageGenerationJob() now performs allowlisted LRE prompt replacement before provider call
runtimeDecisionFlow: Extract order number from safety_metadata or output_requirements
Check LRE_IMAGE_PROMPT_ORDER_ALLOWLIST contains exactly one matching order
Build LRE prompt from order-safe metadata: evidence, meaning themes, symbols, hierarchy, DNA, material, lighting, negative controls
Run runtime Prompt Verification Engine with threshold 95
If PVE passes, send LRE prompt to image provider
If PVE fails or order is not allowlisted, send old prompt
Store safe audit metadata: hashes, PVE score, selected source, primary symbol, secondary symbols, DNA names
oldPromptExample: Create a heritage-inspired symbolic crest. Do not render text, letters, words, surname, motto, or initials.
newLrePromptExample:
LRE Prompt Builder: create a premium symbolic family keepsake artwork for The Rivera Family.
Evidence summary: use the paid order context, values, selected symbols, and family meaning only; do not invent history.
Dominant meaning themes: family continuity, unity, future generations.
Primary composition: Tree must be visually dominant and clearly recognizable.
Primary Symbol DNA: Embossed Legacy Tree DNA: branching canopy, visible roots, warm gold relief, organic asymmetry.
Secondary symbols: Roots, Shield; keep them subordinate and integrated into the frame.
Hierarchy rule: one primary symbol only; secondary symbols remain smaller; supporting symbols never become the focal point; ornament never becomes the meaning.
Material direction: embossed antique gold metal, bevelled edges, engraved relief, tactile depth, premium keepsake finish, not flat line art.
Lighting direction: warm directional highlights, deep shadows, subtle rim light, realistic metallic reflections, cinematic but restrained.
Boundary: personalized symbolic keepsake only; not official heraldry, not certified genealogy, not a status claim.
negativePromptExample: no readable text, no letters, no words, no motto, no surname, no initials, no banner text, flat line art, children's outline drawing, random geometry, generic heraldic template, simple vector icon, official seal, royal crown, noble title, certified genealogy, watermark, signature

promptComparison.oldPromptSummary: The old prompt is safe but generic. It mainly carries broad heritage styling and no-text restrictions.
promptComparison.lrePromptSummary: The LRE prompt adds evidence-led themes, one primary symbol, subordinate secondary symbols, selected Symbol DNA, material direction, lighting direction, background direction, and explicit anti-flat/vector controls.
promptComparison.biggestImprovement: The selected image prompt can now be faithful to Evidence -> Meaning -> Symbol Hierarchy -> DNA -> Art Direction for one allowlisted order instead of using broad surname/country/style variables.

pve.hardFailFallback: If primary symbol, DNA, hierarchy, material direction, negative prompt safety, or fake-history boundaries fail, the system uses the old prompt.

freshTestOrder.reason: A fresh Stripe order was not placed because the bridge code is not deployed to production yet and production SSH/env access is unavailable from this Codex environment. Production HTTP health is reachable, but VPS SSH to 216.128.154.152:22 timed out, GitHub CLI is unavailable, and the in-app browser automation connection failed before GitHub Actions could be triggered.
expectedVerification: PNG generated from LRE prompt when PVE score is 95+

phase3bAttempt.sshResult: blocked: ssh root@216.128.154.152 port 22 timed out
phase3bAttempt.browserAutomationResult: blocked: in-app browser runtime failed to initialize

runtimeStorage.oldPrompt: stored as old_sha256 audit hash, not duplicated as raw text in lre_bridge metadata
runtimeStorage.lrePrompt: selected LRE prompt becomes ai_generation_runs.rendered_prompt only for allowlisted PVE-passing image runs
runtimeStorage.generatedPngPath: provider output temporary_output_ref / later storage asset path remains downstream of existing image generation

safetyChecks: PVE failure falls back to old prompt
No payment, email, vault, Ops, or database schema changes
No raw token, customer email, or secret appears in report
Prompt explicitly blocks readable text and fake official/heraldic/genealogy claims

readiness.nextStep: Deploy the Phase 3 bridge code, create one unpaid fresh order to get the order number, set LRE_IMAGE_PROMPT_ORDER_ALLOWLIST to that exact order number on production, restart api and worker, then complete Stripe test payment and inspect the prompt audit plus artifacts.
